chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 996 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.3811/2019 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 05.04.2023 Mr. Amir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Niazuddin N. Memon, Advocate for respondents No.2 & 3. Mr. Noor Hassan Malik, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- As per para-4 of the petition, the petitioner’s father has already filed a Suit for Declaration, Possession and Permanent Injunction bearing F.C. Suit No.184 of 2017 before the Court of learned Senior Civil Judge, Mirpur Mathelo, which is still pending adjudication. Copy of the memo of plaint of the said Suit is available at page-15, which reflects that the private respondents are also party in the said Suit as defendants. Since the matter is already subjudiced before the competent forum on the same subject matter, this petition being not maintainable in law is dismissed accordingly along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
